thesis_one_liner: Long Island cemetery franchise with ~$162M FY2024 net assets trades OTC with unverified share count; proof-first component schedule base ~$54/sh vs ~$575 quote pending governance verification.
key_assumptions: FY2024 Form 990 net assets $161.9M and net income $5.3M (ProPublica extract)
Provisional 3.46M shares from OTC aggregators — conflicts with $45.40 indicated dividend versus $5.3M NI
Land fair-value gap modeled as risk-adjusted option until Schedule D PDF is local
OTC illiquidity and 501(c)(13) governance reserve -$20/sh base
open_questions: Verified shares outstanding and economic unit definition for PLWN OTC
Whether $45.40 indicated dividend reflects actual cash paid
Schedule D land marks and perpetual-care trust restrictions
